name: AI News Step 01 - RSS to Ingest

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { title: $json.title, summary: $json.summary, content: $json.content, category: $json.category, source: $json.source, source_url: $json.source_url, image_url: $json.image_url, published_at: $json.published_at, importance_score: $json.importance_score, is_breaking: $json.is_breaking, tags: $json.tags } }}
